metadata.name: Combat: 3/3 attacker kills 2/2 blocker, attacker survives with 2 damage marked
metadata.description: MR-M6-08 / MR-M7-16 — p1 controls a 3/3 Grizzly Bears, p2 controls a 2/2 Bear Cub. p1 declares Grizzly Bears as an attacker targeting p2. p2 declares Bear Cub as a blocker. In the combat damage step, Grizzly Bears (power 3) deals 3 damage to Bear Cub (lethal on toughness 2) and Bear Cub (power 2) deals 2 damage to Grizzly Bears (non-lethal on toughness 3). SBA 704.5g destroys Bear Cub; Grizzly Bears survives with 2 damage marked. p2 takes 0 damage (attacker was blocked). This script exercises the full combat sequence: declare_attackers → priority_round → declare_blockers → priority_round → combat_damage → SBAs.
metadata.generation_notes: MR-M6-08 / MR-M7-16 gap: a combat script where the attacker survives with damage marked but the blocker dies. Grizzly Bears (3/3) blocks Bear Cub (2/2): Bears deals 3 to Cub (lethal), Cub deals 2 to Bears (non-lethal). SBA destroys Cub only. Grizzly Bears stays on battlefield with 2 damage marked; damage resets at cleanup (CR 514.2).

script.step_note: p1 declares Grizzly Bears as attacker targeting p2. Bears becomes tapped (CR 508.1f).

actions.description: Initial: Grizzly Bears (untapped) on p1 battlefield, Bear Cub (untapped) on p2 battlefield, life totals 40/40
actions.note: Both creatures are untapped with no summoning sickness (placed via builder which sets has_summoning_sickness: false). Legal attacker and blocker state.

CR 508.1a: Grizzly Bears is untapped and free of summoning sickness — legal attacker. CR 508.1f: Grizzly Bears becomes tapped as a side effect of attacking. CR 508.1k: Grizzly Bears becomes an attacking creature.

actions.description: After declare_attackers: Grizzly Bears is tapped, stack empty
actions.note: CR 508.1f: Grizzly Bears tapped on attack declaration. Bear Cub not yet affected.
CR 116.3d: Both players pass priority with empty stack → advance to DeclareBlockers step.

script.step_note: p2 declares Bear Cub as blocker for Grizzly Bears. Grizzly Bears becomes a blocked creature (CR 509.1h).

actions.note: CR 509.1a: Bear Cub is untapped — legal blocker. CR 509.1g: Bear Cub becomes a blocking creature. CR 509.1h: Grizzly Bears has one blocker declared — becomes a blocked creature.

actions.description: After declare_blockers: both creatures on battlefield, Bear Cub not tapped, stack empty
actions.note: Bear Cub does not tap for blocking. No triggers fire. Stack remains empty.

CR 116.3d: Both players pass priority → advance to CombatDamage step. Engine executes combat_damage_step as turn-based action: Grizzly Bears (power 3, blocked by Bear Cub) assigns 3 damage to Bear Cub (CR 510.1c). Bear Cub (power 2, blocking Grizzly Bears) assigns 2 damage to Grizzly Bears (CR 510.1d). Damage is simultaneous (CR 510.2). SBA 704.5g: Bear Cub has toughness 2 and receives 3 damage (≥ toughness) → lethal → destroyed. Grizzly Bears has toughness 3 and receives 2 damage (< toughness) → not lethal → survives.

script.step_note: Grizzly Bears (3 power) kills Bear Cub (toughness 2). Bear Cub (2 power) marks 2 damage on Grizzly Bears (toughness 3, survives). p2 takes 0 damage (blocked attacker).

results.description: Bear Cub has toughness 2 and received 3 damage from Grizzly Bears — lethal damage — destroyed

actions.note: CR 704.5g: Bear Cub (toughness 2) received 3 damage (≥ toughness) → lethal → destroyed and moved to p2 graveyard. Grizzly Bears (toughness 3) received 2 damage (< toughness) → NOT lethal → stays on battlefield.
Both players pass priority after combat damage and SBAs. Stack empty → advance to EndOfCombat.

actions.description: After combat: p2 at 40 life (no player damage — attacker was blocked), Bear Cub in graveyard, Grizzly Bears still on battlefield
actions.note: CR 510.1c: Grizzly Bears (blocked) assigned all 3 damage to the blocker, not to p2. p2 life remains 40. Bear Cub destroyed by SBA 704.5g. Grizzly Bears survives (2 damage marked, toughness 3 — non-lethal). Damage marked on Grizzly Bears resets at cleanup (CR 514.2).
